DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kite Finds The Feather in Properia Persona; 707-357-2170, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Steven Morger, Esq. of Wendel, Rosen, Black & Dean LLP, 510-834-6600, appearing for Charmane C. Browm, Defendant and moving party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHARMANE BROWN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Continued To Mar-18-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHARMANE BROWN's DEMURRER TO Plaintiff's COMPLAINT for breach of contract

The motion will be heard in department 501 on March 18, 2019 at 9:30 a.m. That department handles real property matters per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
